# delegate

**Instance Property**

The object that manages the drag interaction lifecycle.

## Declaration

```swift
weak var delegate: (any BEDragInteractionDelegate)? { get }
```

## Discussion

The drag interaction’s delegate object.

## Overview

The delegate conforms to [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BEDragInteractionDelegate].

## Handling drag gestures

- **BEDragInteractionDelegate**: A protocol to which the drag interaction delegates conform.
